name: Student Certificate Print
css: @page { size: A4; margin: 15mm; } body { font-family: 'Georgia', serif; color: #333; } .certificate { max-width: 170mm; margin: 0 auto; padding: 10mm; border: 5px solid #c9a227; position: relative; background: #fff; } .certificate::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 3mm; left: 3mm; right: 3mm; bottom: 3mm; border: 1px solid #c9a227; pointer-events: none; } .header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 8mm; } .school-name { font-size: 22pt; font-weight: bold; color: #2c3e50; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; } .school-address { font-size: 10pt; color: #666; margin-top: 1mm; } .certificate-title { font-size: 24pt; font-weight: bold; color: #c9a227; margin-top: 5mm; margin-bottom: 5mm; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; } .content { font-size: 12pt; line-height: 2; text-align: center; margin: 8mm 0; padding: 5mm; } .student-name { font-size: 20pt; font-weight: bold; color: #2c3e50; } .certificate-body { font-size: 12pt; line-height: 1.8; text-align: justify; margin: 5mm 0; } .details { margin: 5mm 0; } .detail-line { font-size: 11pt; margin: 2mm 0; } .signatures { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 10mm; padding-top: 3mm; } .signature { text-align: center; width: 30%; } .signature .line { border-top: 1px solid #333; margin-top: 10mm; padding-top: 2mm; font-size: 10pt; color: #555; } .footer { text-align: center; margin-top: 5mm; font-size: 8pt; color: #999; border-top: 1px solid #ddd; padding-top: 2mm; } .qr-code { position: absolute; bottom: 5mm; right: 8mm; width: 25mm; height: 25mm; } .certificate-id { font-size: 8pt; color: #999; margin-top: 2mm; }
html:
{{ frappe.db.get_single_value('Education Settings', 'school_name') or 'BIZAXL SCHOOL' }}
{{ frappe.db.get_single_value('Education Settings', 'school_address') or '' }}
CERTIFICATE

This is to certify that

{{ doc.student_name }}

has successfully completed the requirements and is hereby awarded this certificate.

{% if doc.class %}
Class: {{ doc.class }}
{% endif %}{% if doc.academic_year %}
Academic Year: {{ doc.academic_year }}
{% endif %}{% if doc.remarks %}
Purpose: {{ doc.remarks }}
{% endif %}
Principal
School Seal
Academic Coordinator
Certificate ID: {{ doc.name }} | Issued: {{ doc.generated_on or '' }}
